text: Hey love, how are you doing? Haven't heard from you in a bit
Hi Mom! I'm good, just been a crazy week at the clinic, barely had a minute. Missing you though 💕
Same! Come over for dinner soon yeah? I'll cook something nice
hey you free this weekend? was thinking we could do something fun
depends what you have in mind lol, i'm free saturday afternoon maybe
cool, maybe grab lunch and catch that new movie? or we could just chill at yours
Hi sweetie! How are you doing? Haven't heard from you in a few days. Everything okay? 💕
Hey Grandma! All good, been so busy with patients this week, obachan. Missing you though! How are you feeling?
I'm fine, just worry about you not resting enough 😊 Come visit soon? I'll make your favorite dumplings
Hey! How have you been? Haven't heard from you in a while
Good! Nonstop at work, haven't had a chance to breathe, but all is well. How about you?
Same here! Let's catch up soon over coffee sometime?
Hey love, how was the run this morning?
traffic on H1 was insane today lol
Grandma had a good day today, ate well
Don't forget Grandma's soup on Sunday
re-piped a whole house in Pearl City
See you Sunday for the visit
you see the game last night?
The Mililani yard needs trimming, no rush
Did you take your medicine before the coffee?
The plumeria is blooming again out back
Holiday plans — you and Kai still cooking?
Call me when you get a chance
can I crash on the futon friday?
Saw a hand therapy article, sending it over
found a used CHT book online, want the link?
How's the studying going this week?
Drive safe on the way up
